description_long: This street light features a tall, slender green pole with a flared base for stability. At the top, two ornate lamp heads are mounted on short, curved arms extending symmetrically from a central support. The lamp heads are globe-shaped with a frosted white finish, capped by small, dark finials. The overall design is reminiscent of classic Victorian or early 20th-century street lighting, lending an elegant and historic feel. The pole itself is smooth and unadorned, focusing attention on the decorative lamp heads. This type of street light is commonly found in parks, historic districts, or along pedestrian walkways.
description: A tall green street light with two ornate, frosted globe lamp heads on curved arms, evoking a classic, historic style.
description_view_0: Front view showing both globe lamp heads and the symmetrical curved arms clearly.
description_view_1: Side view with only one lamp head visible, arms and central support appear aligned.
description_view_2: Rear view, identical to the front, displaying both lamp heads and arms symmetrically.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again only one lamp head visible, arms and support aligned.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Classic globe design with frosted glass, capped by small finials, and mounted on short, decorative curved arms.
